nasb.text: They decorate it with silver and with gold; They fasten it with nails and with hammers So that it will not totter.

esv.text: They decorate it with silver and gold; they fasten it with hammer and nails so that it cannot move.

cnv.text: 他們用金銀把它修飾， 用釘子和鎚子把它釘牢， 使它不動搖。

ccb.text: 以金银作装饰， 用钉子和锤子钉牢， 以免晃动。
